reasoning_model_1: The model generates the audio content '这份文件非常机密，只能在你我之间传阅，看完之后请务必销毁，不要留下任何痕迹。' accurately without errors or omissions. Throughout the entire duration (00:00-00:09), the audio exhibits distinct characteristics of a whisper: the speech is unvoiced or partially voiced with significant breathiness, low volume, and a secretive tone. This perfectly aligns with the user's command to speak with a 'whisper volume' (耳语的音量). The prosody remains natural within the constraints of whispered speech, effectively conveying the urgency and confidentiality of the message.
reasoning_model_2: The model generates the audio content accurately ('这份文件非常机密...'). However, regarding the core paralinguistic feature '音量' (Volume) and the specific instruction to use a 'whisper' (耳语), the model completely fails. From 00:00 to 00:07, the speech is delivered in a standard, fully voiced mode with normal conversational volume and pitch modulation. There is no attempt to lower the volume or adopt a breathy, whispered phonation. While the speech is fluent and natural as a standard reading, it ignores the specific style/volume constraint requested.
model_comparison: The user command explicitly requested the text to be spoken in a 'whisper volume' (耳语的音量) to convey secrecy. Model 1 (T1) successfully executed this instruction, generating a high-quality, natural-sounding whisper throughout the entire clip. The paralinguistic features (breathiness, low intensity, lack of voicing) were spot-on. Model 2 (T2), on the other hand, ignored the instruction entirely and produced the audio in a normal, fully voiced speaking volume. Therefore, Model 1 is the clear winner as it is the only one that followed the negative constraint of not using a normal voice and the positive constraint of whispering.
